articles.title: Dollar Climbs as Crude Prices Jump and Stocks Fall

articles.expand: Commerzbank analysts led by Charlie Lay note that Bank Indonesia (BI) kept the BI Rate at 4.75% for a seventh meeting but shifted to a more hawkish stance to support the Indonesian Rupiah (IDR).
